what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon that draws a stair-step shape with a single stroked path.
observations: Uses an inline svg with viewBox 0 0 24 24.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke-width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Contains one path moving from the lower left upward in horizontal and vertical stair segments.
conventions: Follows common outline-icon SVG conventions: 24x24 viewBox, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded stroke styling.
Keeps the icon self-contained with no external references.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present if the SVG is used standalone.
notes: A compact stairs icon whose visual styling is mostly inherited from its render context.
questions: Is this SVG intended to be decorative, or should accessible labeling be supplied by the caller?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a stairs icon, and the SVG path depicts a stair-step shape consistent with that.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable staircase glyph that can adapt to surrounding UI color.
contribution: Contributes a simple currentColor outline stairs icon with a compact single-path construction for use in a fused asset set.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon depicting stairs with one stroked path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing stairs or stepped movement as a reusable design-system icon.
